sections.label: Title
sections.guidance: State intervention/model and core contribution clearly.

sections.label: Abstract
sections.guidance: Summarize background, methods, results, and conclusion with evidence-backed claims.

sections.label: Introduction
sections.guidance: Move from background to knowledge gap, then objective/hypothesis.

sections.label: Methods
sections.guidance: Describe study design, materials, protocol, and statistics for reproducibility.

sections.label: Results
sections.guidance: Report outcomes objectively with figure/table references.

sections.label: Discussion
sections.guidance: Interpret findings, compare literature, state limitations and implications.

sections.label: Conclusion
sections.guidance: Provide concise take-home message and future direction.
